intent_tree: {"处理MP3文件并确认音频质量": {"查找指定目录下的所有MP3文件": {}, "分析音频文件的质量指标": {"检查比特率是否过低": {}, "检查平均音量是否过低": {}, "检测是否存在长时间静音": {}}, "生成质量分析报告": {"标记潜在问题文件": {}, "输出分析结果供人工复查": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "配置搜索目录"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "扫描指定目录查找所有MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "读取每个MP3文件的基本信息（如比特率、时长）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "计算音频的平均音量（dBFS）"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "检测音频中的非静音段落以识别可能的静音问题"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "判断比特率是否低于128kbps"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "判断平均音量是否低于-30dBFS"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "判断音频中是否存在超过2秒的静音段落"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "标记有问题的文件（低比特率、低音量或静音问题）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "生成包含分析结果的报告"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "提示用户进行人工复查"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "configure"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "findFiles"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "analyzeAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "analyzeAudio"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "checkVolume"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node8", "type": "detectSilence"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node6", "type": "checkBitrate"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node9", "type": "flagIssue"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "flagIssue"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "flagIssue"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "promptReview"}]}
